channel.title: GitHub PowerShell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PowerShell in GitHub

item.title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
item.description: Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

item.title: memstechtips/UnattendedWinstall
item.description: Personalized Unattended Answer Files that helps automatically debloat and customize Windows 10 & 11 during the installation process.

item.title: jamesstringerparsec/Easy-GPU-PV
item.description: A Project dedicated to making GPU Partitioning on Windows easier!

item.title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
item.description: WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

item.title: dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
item.description: Adds 3D acceleration support for P106-090 / P106-100 / P104-100 / P104-101 / P102-100 / CMP 30HX / CMP 40HX / CMP 50HX / CMP 70HX / CMP 90HX / CMP 170HX mining cards as well as RTX 3060 3840SP and RTX 3080 Ti 20GB.

item.title: ntdevlabs/tiny11builder
item.description: Scripts to build a trimmed-down Windows 11 image.

item.title: cisagov/ScubaGear
item.description: Automation to assess the state of your M365 tenant against CISA's baselines

item.title: TrimarcJake/Locksmith
item.description: A small tool built to find and fix common misconfigurations in Active Directory Certificate Services.

item.title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
item.description: The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

item.title: redcanaryco/invoke-atomicredteam
item.description: Invoke-AtomicRedTeam is a PowerShell module to execute tests as defined in the [atomics folder](https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/tree/master/atomics) of Red Canary's Atomic Red Team project.
